rule_text: AP works tenders must use a two-cover sealed-bid system: Cover-A (Technical Bid with qualification data) + Cover-B (Price Bid), both placed in outer Cover-C provided by department; Cover-C is opened first in presence of bidders; if Cover-A or Cover-B is found unsealed, the tender is summarily rejected.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>1000000
verification_method: Check tender ITB specifies two-cover system + outer envelope; confirm minutes record Cover-C opening witnessed by bidders

rule_text: Price Bid (Cover-B) of bidders disqualified at technical evaluation must NOT be opened — kept in safe custody until tender finalisation, then returned along with EMD.
verification_method: Check tender minutes: only qualified bidders' Cover-B opened; rejected-bidder EMD return record exists

rule_text: BOQ Schedule-A in AP works must be split: Part-I (working items quoted by bidder) + Part-II (LS provisions reimbursable on conditions); the bidder's tender percentage applies ONLY to Part-I, never to Part-II.
verification_method: Check BOQ structure: Part-I/II split + tender_pct applied to Part-I only; reject if pct applied to LS heads

rule_text: Tenders are finalised at delegated tiers: EE/SE up to their TS power; Chief Engineer up to Rs.2 crore; works above Rs.2 crore must be referred to Commissioner of Tenders (COT) with Technical Bid + Price Bid evaluation.
verification_method: Check Tender Concluding Authority rank: <Rs.2cr → CE; >Rs.2cr → COT order on file with eval reports

rule_text: Tender NEGOTIATIONS are NOT permitted at any level for AP works — once tenders are received, post-tender negotiation is prohibited.
verification_method: Check tender minutes: no L1-negotiation record; reject if tender_concluded_value differs from L1_quoted_value

rule_text: Tender notice timelines for AP works: 14 days minimum from publication to bid submission for first call; 7 days for re-call (second call).
verification_method: Check (bid_submission_close - NIT_publication_date) >= 14 days for first call; >=7 days for second call

rule_text: Three-Box submission system for AP works: tenders received at SE office, at SP (Superintendent of Police) office of district, at ENC office, OR by post to SE; bidder may use any of these channels.
verification_method: Check NIT lists all 4 submission channels; reject if NIT restricts to single channel for >Rs.2cr works

rule_text: AP qualification criteria for Works > Rs.10 lakh: bidder must have, in any ONE of last 5 financial years preceding tender: (a) completed similar works as prime contractor of value >= 50% of estimated value, (b) executed minimum 50% of expected peak yearly quantities for principal items.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>1000000
verification_method: Check bidder QR documents: similar-works value/year >= 0.5 × estimated_value AND quantity-execution proof for principal items

rule_text: AP works bidder must demonstrate liquid assets/credit facility equivalent to 3 months of peak-construction-period cash flow; EMD must be submitted as Bank Guarantee in standard format = 1% of estimated contract value, valid for completion period + DLP.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>1000000
verification_method: Check bidder solvency >= 3-month peak cash flow; EMD BG @ 1% of ECV with validity covering construction + DLP

rule_text: Only experience from Works executed for State/Central Government departments or State/Central Government undertakings shall be considered for AP works qualification — private-sector experience is excluded.
verification_method: Check bidder experience certificates: only State/Central Govt-issued certificates valid; private-sector references rejected

rule_text: Available Bid Capacity for AP Works = (A × N × 2) − B, where A = max civil-engineering works value executed in any one year of last 5 years (price-updated), N = number of years for completion, B = value of existing commitments due in same period; bidder qualifies only if Available Bid Capacity > Estimated Value.
verification_method: Compute (A × N × 2) − B from bidder's QR docs; reject if result <= ECV; verify A is price-level-adjusted
